race.description: Dubbo Rsl Motel Country Boosted Mdn Hcp
race.comment: FLEE WITH ME (8) twenty-three start Maiden with her hoof on the till. Back in trip and went under narrowly with a nose second over 1600m at Warren in a Super Maiden. Gets in light with the 1.5kg claim and finds her race from the inside gate. NOTHING FINER (5) struggled to run out a solid 1600m with a tiring seventh at Warren in a Super Maiden. Brings a strong set of figures and can hold a position from the wide gate. Each way. MISS PEONY (4) finished in the minor money at her last three starts and ticks a few boxes today in this easier contest. No surprise to see her finally salute. ADAMANA (6) has struggled to draw a low gate at the last two starts and today is no different. Comes back in trip and likely to be ridden more patiently today. Place preferred. LITLFELA (9) mixing his form and assess on the solid fourth over this trip at Warren two-back. Goes into the exotics.
